misconceptions.description: Believes AI has consciousness or emotions.
misconceptions.remediation_hint: Clarify that current AI has no consciousness; it processes patterns.

misconceptions.description: Thinks more data always improves models.
misconceptions.remediation_hint: Discuss quality, bias, and diminishing returns of data.

misconceptions.description: Believes AI will replace all human jobs.
misconceptions.remediation_hint: Discuss augmentation vs replacement and new roles.
Explain when precision or recall matters more.

misconceptions.description: Treats AI as black box with no explainable process.
misconceptions.remediation_hint: Introduce how models learn from data.

misconceptions.description: Thinks deeper networks are always better.

misconceptions.remediation_hint: Distinguish statistical patterns from semantic understanding.

misconceptions.description: One model or approach for every problem.
misconceptions.remediation_hint: Match problem type to learning paradigm.

misconceptions.description: Assumes privacy and utility are always in conflict.
